title: Cannot access dashboard
description: User reports a 404 error when attempting to log into the main analytics dashboard. Cleared cache but issue persists.

title: Billing discrepancy - Invoice #882
description: Customer claims they were double-charged for the premium subscription seat additions.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: Requesting the implementation of a system-wide dark mode for the mobile application.

title: API Connection Timeout
description: Intermittent timeouts occurring on the /v1/data endpoint during peak hours.

title: Password reset link not arriving
description: Customer has requested a reset link three times; checked spam folder.

title: Update shipping address
description: Need to change the delivery address for order #44901 before it leaves the warehouse.

title: Mobile app crashing on startup
description: App closes immediately after the splash screen on iOS 17.4.

title: Inquiry about bulk discounts
description: Potential lead asking if there is a discount for purchasing over 500 licenses.

title: Broken link in documentation
description: The link to 'Setting up Webhooks' in the developer docs leads to a dead page.

title: Security Vulnerability Report
description: Researcher found a potential XSS vulnerability on the user profile settings page.

title: Integrations not syncing
description: Salesforce integration has stopped syncing new leads since yesterday evening.

title: Refund request - Service downtime
description: Customer requesting a pro-rated refund for the 4-hour outage.

title: Unable to upload profile picture
description: Error 'File type not supported' appearing even when uploading standard .jpg files.

title: Account verification stuck
description: Uploaded ID documents 48 hours ago but status is still 'Pending Verification'.

title: Exporting data takes too long
description: CSV export for reports with >10,000 rows is timing out or taking over 5 minutes.
